CustomField.description: #DimensionStory Created as a part of Dimension Story. Standard Dimensions - MSN/ESN, Lessee, Lease Name, Entity,Bank Account.
CustomField.formula: IF((Name == 'MSN/ESN' || Name == 'Lessee' || Name == 'Lease Name' || Name == 'Entity' || Name == 'Bank Account'), true, false)
CustomField.label: _Is Standard
